params.siblings: Merkle sibling path to restore the original leaf.

params.amount: Deposit amount in token base units (must be > 0).
params.commitment: Registration commitment C (must be < STARK_FIELD_PRIME and != 0).
params.siblings: Merkle sibling path for the new note's leaf slot.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

rotateServerRoots(uint32,uint256,uint256.details: Epoch numbers must increase strictly monotonically.

params.clearRoot: The clearance-signature XMSS root for this epoch.
params.stateRoot: The state-signature XMSS root for this epoch.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

MERKLE_DEPTH().notice: Merkle tree depth (mirrored from MerkleUpdateLib for convenience).

PROTOCOL_VERSION().notice: Protocol version pinned for this deployment.

billingToken().notice: The ERC20 token used for billing.

challengeEscapeWithdrawal(uint32,(uint8,.notice: Challenge an escape-hatch withdrawal by presenting a more recent         request proof whose nullifier matches the pending withdrawal.

claimExpired(uint32,uint256[32]).notice: Claim an expired note's deposit for the treasury.

currentRoot().notice: Current Merkle root of the active-note tree.

deposit(bytes32,uint128,uint256[32]).notice: Deposit tokens and create a new note.

finalizeEscapeWithdrawal(uint32).notice: Finalize an escape-hatch withdrawal after the challenge period.

initiateEscapeWithdrawal((uint8,uint16,u.notice: Begin an escape-hatch withdrawal (no server clearance).

mutualClose((uint8,uint16,uint64,address.notice: Close a note cooperatively with server clearance.

nextNoteId().notice: Next note index to allocate on deposit.

noteTtl().notice: Time-to-live for notes, in seconds, added to block.timestamp at deposit.

pause().notice: Pause the contract (blocks deposits and withdrawals).

pendingWithdrawals(uint32).notice: Pending escape-hatch withdrawal data by noteId.

policyChargeCap().notice: Maximum per-policy charge (informational, enforced in Cairo).

requestChargeCap().notice: Maximum per-request charge (informational, enforced in Cairo).

rotateServerRoots(uint32,uint256,uint256.notice: Publish a new XMSS epoch with state and clearance roots.

setProofAdapter(address).notice: Set the proof adapter contract address.

treasury().notice: Address that receives the operator's share of closed notes.

usedNullifiers(uint256).notice: Tracks consumed nullifiers to prevent replay.
